hero.name: devcy0922
hero.headline: Extending production-grade SaaS boundaries into AI platforms.
hero.tagline: I design and validate one coherent system boundary spanning authentication, tenant isolation, model routing, deployment safety, and auditable operations.
path.caption: From request entry to operational audit
path.boundary: Every stage revalidates identity and tenant scope. Operational secrets and internal model IDs never reach the public interface.
capability.boundary.title: Multi-tenant request boundary
capability.boundary.desc: Enforce identity, authorization, quotas, and data scope on every request.
capability.delivery.title: Verifiable delivery system
capability.delivery.desc: Control change risk with IaC, security regression tests, and automated delivery.
capability.runtime.title: Observable AI runtime
capability.runtime.desc: Connect routing, inference, and audit events into one operational flow.
section.selectedSystems.desc: These are not isolated demos. They form an execution path across identity, data isolation, inference, and operational verification, with design decisions, failure boundaries, and public repository evidence documented for each system.
lab.intro.title: The execution path comes before the pitch.
lab.intro.desc: Use the Live Lab below to inspect runtime contracts and failure boundaries, then follow a real private LLM request from policy checks through response auditing.
project.govail.title: GoVail Gateway
project.govail.desc: A Rust Gateway that applies SurrealDB Key authentication, model/RPM/DLP policies, LiteLLM routing, and Loki auditing to actual private LLM invocation paths.
project.aegis.title: Aegis-LLM
project.aegis.desc: Designed tenant authentication, request throttling, DLP, Prompt Security, and Upstream Fallback into a single SaaS Control Plane.
project.slicerag.title: SliceRAG
project.slicerag.desc: Stores and retrieves documents only within the project scope defined by the Gateway, blocking cross-tenant access via regression testing.
project.agentsecops.title: AgentSecOps
project.agentsecops.desc: Automatically validates authentication, RAG isolation, PII masking, Prompt Injection blocking, and LLM Fallback using synthetic data.
project.lingo.title: LingoAgent
project.lingo.desc: This page was translated by LingoAgent. It follows a pipeline: ko.json change → LLM translation + ICU validation → GitHub Action auto-commit.
lingo.banner.title: Translated by LingoAgent
lingo.banner.desc: The UI text on this page was automatically generated from ko.json via the LingoAgent pipeline (ICU validation + LLM QA).
